title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 27 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 27 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 27 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/01/2026
Today, Dalian iron ore futures weakened in early trading before staging a minor recovery in the a ernoon session. The benchmark contractI2605 ulmately closed at 788 RMB/ tonne, represen ng a decline of 0.51% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, prices rose by 2-3 RMB/tonne.
